sections.title: 1.  ARMORY VAULT CONVERSION - 28 Barracks Rooms to 14 Armory Vaults
2.  ARMORY EXTERIOR - Walkways, Landings, Concrete Pads
3.  GYM TO WORKSPACE CONVERSION - CLB-4 Commo Swing Space to 4th MarRegt Admin/Ops
4.  COMM ROOM & WEAPONS CLEANING AREA
5.  ADMIN - Laundry Room Conversion to Administrative Workspace
6.  BATHS TO OSS VAULT - Locker Rooms / Sauna / Steam Room to OSS w/ SIPR Network
7.  BUILDING GENERAL - Whole-Building Systems & Code Compliance
8.  BUILDING TELECOM - Telecom Room, OSP & ISP Cabling per UFC 3-580-01
9.  EXTERIOR - Covered Overhangs, Pavilion, Site Work
10.  RESTROOMS & MISCELLANEOUS
11.  HAZARDOUS MATERIALS - Asbestos Mastic Abatement (Bhate Environmental Associates, 19 Nov 2001)

items.desc: New vault doors/frames/locksets - GSA Class V, Hamilton CI-5 (4 armory hallway locations)
items.notes: Hamilton CI-5 door + flange set: $10,143.40 | Prorated air freight (TQL Global, 5-door shipment CVG-OKA): $1,956.00 | Install labor (certified 2-person crew, OCONUS): $2,500.00 | Unit total: $14,599.40

items.desc: Structural walls to support vault doors, drop ceiling infrastructure
items.notes: Reinforced masonry/concrete walls, headers, lintels for vault door support

items.desc: Remove 28 windows/frames and 2 exit doors/frames (30 openings total)
items.notes: Window and door removal incl frame, disposal

items.desc: CMU wall enclosures at 17 former window openings
items.notes: CMU infill 5'x6' openings: block, mortar, rebar, tie-in to existing structure

items.desc: New weapons port issue windows - custom steel frame, ballistic rated (11 EA)
items.notes: Custom fabricated steel-frame weapon issue port windows, installed

items.desc: Remove drop ceilings in all 28 armory rooms (6,270 SF)
items.notes: Ceiling grid/tile removal, disposal

items.desc: Paint all armory interior walls - 28 rooms (6,270 SF)
items.notes: Interior latex paint, wall prep

items.desc: Armory bathrooms: Remove CT floor/walls, refinish, paint - 11 bathrooms (~1,650 SF)
items.notes: Ceramic tile removal, skim coat, paint, VCT. 11 baths x 150 SF

items.desc: Remove 11 bathroom fixture sets (toilet, tub, sink, accessories)
items.notes: Full fixture removal, disconnect, disposal per set

items.desc: Cap plumbing lines - 11 armory bathrooms
items.notes: Cap water supply/drainage, includes access and patching

items.desc: Adjust valves to limit deadlegs in capped armory plumbing lines
items.notes: System-wide valve adjustment to prevent stagnation

items.desc: Realign all electrical/mechanical ceiling fixtures after ceiling removal - 28 rooms
items.notes: Relocate/adjust HVAC diffusers, sprinklers, fire alarm, lighting per room

items.desc: Electronic Security System (IDS) - 2 zones, 14 vaults: panel, BMS, PIR, keypads, fiber, conduit
items.notes: ESAMS-compliant IDS: 2 zones, 14 vault areas, BMS, PIR, keypads, fiber backbone, conduit, testing

items.desc: Install 28 new quad Work Area Outlets (WAOs) in armory spaces
items.notes: Quad WAO: 4-port data/voice outlet, conduit, cabling, termination

items.desc: New metal shelves at 11 weapons issue port windows
items.notes: Stainless/galvanized steel shelf, brackets, fasteners

items.desc: Extend backside walkways - concrete sidewalk, safety railings (~200 LF)
items.notes: Concrete sidewalk, railings, grading, landscaping

items.desc: New exterior landing/walkway at 11 weapons issue port windows
items.notes: Concrete landing pad ~100 SF each at 11 issue window locations

items.desc: New exterior concrete pads at issue windows - civil (11 locations x 80 SF)
items.notes: Formed concrete pad, 4 inch, gravel base

items.desc: Gym hallway: Patch concrete baseboard/wall, paint interior, new VCT flooring
items.notes: Minor patching, paint, and flooring in gym hallway

items.desc: Add exhaust ventilation to new indoor weapons cleaning area
items.notes: Exhaust fan, ductwork, exterior louver, controls for weapons cleaning fumes

items.desc: Rec Room: New COMM room 8'x10' w/ gypsum walls, VCT, paint; replace acoustical ceiling
items.notes: New 80 SF room: partitions, door, ceiling, flooring, paint

items.desc: Rec Room: New electrical outlets and switches in COMM room
items.notes: Outlets, switches, dedicated circuits for comm equipment

items.desc: Split A/C systems for telecom room and COMMSEC storage vault (2 EA)
items.notes: Ductless mini-split A/C, dedicated cooling for telecom/COMMSEC spaces

items.desc: Adjust HVAC supply duct/diffusers and exhaust for admin use in laundry room
items.notes: Reroute/adjust ductwork, diffusers, registers for office occupancy

items.desc: Cap water supply, drainage, floor drains for washers and utility sink; adjust valves
items.notes: Cap and seal all laundry plumbing, reduce deadlegs

items.desc: Laundry Room: Repaint all interior walls, new VCT flooring (~300 SF)
items.notes: Interior paint + VCT: $4/SF paint + $5/SF VCT

items.desc: Remove dryer exhaust duct and cap wall vent
items.notes: Duct removal, vent cap, patch and paint exterior/interior wall

items.desc: Demo CIP concrete walls in shower/locker/sauna areas for open floorplan
items.notes: Structural demolition of CIP concrete walls - engineering assessment required for load-bearing

items.desc: Cut CIP wall for new door opening from showers to hallway
items.notes: Saw-cut CIP wall, install new header/frame - structural engineering required

items.desc: Mens: Complete demo - toilet partitions, CT floor/walls, fixtures, lockers, ceiling, showers
items.notes: Full gut: 2 toilets, 2 urinals, 2 sinks, 2 showers, partitions, lockers, tile, ceiling

items.desc: Womens: Complete demo - benches, showers, fixtures, CT floor/walls, partitions, ceiling
items.notes: Full gut: 2 showers, 2 toilets, 2 sinks, partitions, tile, ceiling

items.desc: Sauna Room: Remove all wood seats/benches/ceiling/walls/flooring, brick enclosure, exhaust vents
items.notes: Complete sauna strip-out to bare structure

items.desc: Steam Room: Remove ceramic tile walls, benches, flooring, door/frame
items.notes: Complete steam room strip-out including tile and moisture barriers

items.desc: Mens: New ceiling, wall refinish/paint, level floor, VCT, plug drains (~398 SF)
items.notes: Full renovation finishes: ceiling grid/tile, wall prep/paint, floor leveling, VCT

items.desc: Womens: New lighting, VCT flooring, wall refinish/paint, new alum door/frame/lockset (~300 SF)
items.notes: Full renovation finishes + new aluminum entry door assembly

items.desc: Sauna Room: New VCT flooring, refinish concrete walls, new ceiling, entry door (~97 SF)
items.notes: Convert to admin space: floor, walls, ceiling, door

items.desc: Steam Room: New VCT flooring, refinish concrete walls, new ceiling, entry door (~124 SF)
items.notes: Convert to admin space: floor, walls, ceiling, door

items.desc: Fitness Room Vault: New security door/frame/lockset/closure (X-10 combination lock)
items.notes: Heavy-duty security door with X-10 lock for COMMSEC storage

items.desc: Modify/cap/remove all plumbing - sauna, steam, mens/womens locker rooms
items.notes: Full plumbing removal/capping across 4 wet areas

items.desc: Install new DX multi-zone split A/C system for new OSS area
items.notes: Multi-zone VRF/DX: outdoor unit, indoor units, refrigerant piping, controls, startup

items.desc: Steam Room area: New electrical light fixtures, outlets, switches, COMM drops
items.notes: Electrical fit-out for converted admin space

items.desc: Sauna Room: Remove existing electrical, new lights/outlets/switches, COMM drops
items.notes: Full electrical replacement for converted space

items.desc: Mens: New electrical light fixtures, outlets, switches, COMM requirements
items.notes: Electrical fit-out for converted admin space

items.desc: Womens: New electrical fixtures, wiring, outlets, switches, relocate fire alarm
items.notes: Electrical fit-out + fire alarm relocation

items.desc: Steam Room: Remove electrical fixtures/lights/alarms/wiring
items.notes: Demo tier electrical removal (supplement item 29)

items.desc: Mens: Remove all electrical light fixtures and switches
items.notes: Demo tier electrical removal

items.desc: Womens: Remove all electrical fixtures, wiring, outlets, switches
items.notes: Demo tier electrical removal

items.desc: SIPR network: Lockable wallmount enclosure, backboard, ground bus bar, fiber optic from TR, ~10 quad WAOs, conduit - CNSSAM TEMPEST/01-13
items.notes: Full SIPR infrastructure per CNSSAM TEMPEST/01-13: enclosure, backboard, bus bar, fiber, WAOs, conduit, testing

items.desc: OSS Vault entrance: GSA Class V vault door, frame, flange set, hardware, certified installation, and prorated air shipping (1 EA)
items.notes: Hamilton CI-5 door + flange set: $10,143.40 | Prorated air freight (TQL Global, 5-door shipment, CVG-OKA): $1,956.00 | Install labor (certified 2-person crew, OCONUS): $2,500.00 | Unit total: $14,599.40

items.desc: OSS Vault entrance: Structural reinforcement at CIP wall opening for vault door emplacement (steel header, threshold plate, anchor bolts into CIP wall)
items.notes: Supplemental to Item 35 (CIP wall cut $5,000). Vault door ~900 lbs requires steel lintel, sill plate, and frame anchoring into existing CIP wall.

items.desc: Adjust mechanical components first floor (HVAC diffusers, sprinklers, fire alarms) for ceiling removal
items.notes: First floor mechanical adjustment: sprinkler heads, diffusers, FA devices

items.desc: Replace air-cooled chillers (2 EA) and chilled water circulating pumps (2 EA) - END OF SERVICE LIFE
items.notes: CRITICAL: Chillers 12+ yrs past service life. 2x 100-150 ton chillers + 2x CW pumps + controls. VERIFY tonnage with FEAD mech engineer.

items.desc: Test, Adjust, Balance (TAB) all duct HVAC systems throughout facility (all 4 floors)
items.notes: Full building TAB per AABC/NEBB standards. VERIFY if scope is first floor only or whole building.

items.desc: Replace 4 fire hose cabinets in new armory spaces (recessed, stainless, w/ hose/extinguisher)
items.notes: Recessed FHC per NFPA 10, stainless steel finish

items.desc: Add supplemental water fountains in new OSS/Admin areas (4 EA)
items.notes: Wall-mounted water fountains, plumbing connection, ADA compliance

items.desc: Demo existing TR - remove all existing racks, cabling, equipment, flooring, paint
items.notes: Full TR strip-out for renovation

items.desc: Construct new TR: raised floor, racks, UPS, patch panels, grounding, EPO, fire suppression, HVAC
items.notes: Full TR build-out per UFC 3-580-01 and MCIPAC G6 policy

items.desc: Install OSP fiber optic cable from nearest demarcation point to building TR
items.notes: OSP fiber, conduit, hand-holes, termination

items.desc: Install ISP horizontal cabling - 28 drops to new armory spaces, admin, OSS areas
items.notes: Cat6A or OM3 fiber per MCIPAC G6 policy, conduit, termination

items.desc: Remove existing ISP cabling throughout first floor
items.notes: Removal of legacy cabling, conduit, boxes per demo scope

items.desc: Tree removal at new exterior concrete pad locations (6 EA)
items.notes: Tree removal and disposal, stump grinding

items.desc: Steel-frame covered overhang at issue windows - 3 locations
items.notes: Steel-frame canopy structure, metal roofing, concrete footings, per location

items.desc: New outdoor pavilion - steel frame, metal roof, concrete slab (approx 20'x40')
items.notes: Steel-frame pavilion: columns, roof, 800 SF concrete slab, perimeter drainage

items.desc: Site drainage improvements at new concrete pad locations
items.notes: French drains or surface grading at pad locations

items.desc: Public restroom: New fixtures (2 toilets, 2 sinks, accessories) for general use area
items.notes: Replace fixtures, handles, accessories - ADA compliance check

items.desc: New security door/frame/lockset for exterior storage (1 EA)
items.notes: Heavy-duty exterior security door with lockset and door closer

items.desc: Asbestos mastic abatement - OSS full-gut areas (mens locker ~398 SF, womens ~300 SF, sauna ~97 SF, steam ~124 SF); cove base/kickboard removal triggers abatement of underlying H3 ACM mastic (15% Chrysotile)
items.notes: Bhate Survey 19 Nov 2001, H3: 15% Chrysotile mastic under kickboard, 8,392 LF building-wide. Scope-limited to OSS gut rooms only. Perimeter est from room SF. FEAD ENV/IH to field-verify LF and unit cost before construction.

items.desc: Asbestos mastic abatement - armory bathroom VCT/CT renovation (11 bathrooms, ~1,650 SF total); floor tile and wall base removal at wall junctions triggers abatement of underlying H3 ACM mastic (15% Chrysotile)
items.notes: Bhate Survey 19 Nov 2001, H3. Armory scope Item 11: CT floor/wall removal in 11 baths. VCT/CT installation requires cove base removal at perimeter. Perimeter est: 11 baths x ~35 LF avg = 385 LF. FEAD ENV/IH to field-verify.

items.desc: Asbestos mastic abatement - gym conversion (VCT 1,749 SF, est. 168 LF perimeter) and laundry/admin conversion (VCT 300 SF, est. 70 LF perimeter); new VCT installation at wall base triggers abatement of underlying H3 ACM mastic
items.notes: Bhate Survey 19 Nov 2001, H3. Scope Items 3B (gym VCT) and 24 (laundry VCT) require base removal at wall perimeter. Combined perimeter est 238 LF. FEAD ENV/IH to field-verify.

items.desc: ACM re-inspection and survey confirmation - verify 2001 Bhate Environmental survey findings, full building pre-design per full HVAC duct and plumbing floor demolition scope
items.notes: Bhate Environmental Associates 2001, NVLAP accredited PLM. Re-inspection required - 25-yr survey age and full system replacement scope per UFC 3-470-06.

items.desc: Lead-Based Paint (LBP) survey - whole building pre-design per UFC 3-470-03 and EPA RRP Rule 40 CFR Part 745
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: LBP inspection and risk assessment, commercial building, 13,484 SF. RSM 02 82 16.

items.desc: Targeted ACM abatement - H2 rose 12x12 floor tile, 570 SF, Corridor 100/Rooms 8 and 23, 4% Chrysotile non-friable; full plumbing DWV replacement triggers floor demolition per OSHA 1926.1101
items.notes: Bhate 2001 confirmed: H2, 570 SF, 4% Chrysotile, non-friable, good condition. Abatement triggered by confirmed floor demolition scope. RS Means FY24 CONUS RSM 02 82 13.13.

items.desc: HAZMAT contractor mobilization, containment setup, negative air, air monitoring, and post-abatement clearance testing
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: HAZMAT contractor mobilization, commercial abatement project, complete. RSM 02 82 13.

items.desc: ACM contingency allowance - potential ceiling tile and duct insulation disturbance building-wide per full HVAC duct replacement scope; 13,484 SF per UFC 3-470-06; confirm or remove at design following re-inspection per Item 43
items.notes: Level 3 ROM allowance $5/SF per UFC 3-470-06 guidance. Included in hard scope. Confirm or remove at design following re-inspection per Item 43. RS Means FY24 CONUS: ACM ceiling/insulation abatement allowance.

items.desc: Demo existing central chilled water plant - chiller C-1, AHU-1, BC-1 booster coil, pumps P-1 (2 EA), expansion tanks EWT-1/EWT-2, reheat coil RH-1, controls, and associated peripherals per as-built equipment schedule Sheet 5-20
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Mechanical equipment demolition and disposal, central chilled water plant, 80-100 ton class. RSM 15 21 05.

items.desc: Demo existing ductwork building-wide - all supply, return, and exhaust sheet metal duct, hangers, insulation, diffusers, and registers, 13,484 SF; original 1984 construction past ASHRAE 30-yr service life per mechanical evaluation 19 Mar 2026
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Sheet metal ductwork demolition, existing commercial building, per SF floor area. RSM 23 07 13.

items.desc: Remove fuel oil tank OT-1 (240-gal above-ground steel) and all fuel oil supply and return piping - boiler B-1 system removal
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Above-ground storage tank removal and disposal, 240-gal steel tank, includes transport. RSM 02 82 13.

items.desc: Remove abandoned compressed air system - air compressor, distribution piping, and outlets building-wide
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Compressed air system demolition, piping removal, existing building. RSM 15 21 05.

items.desc: New air-cooled chilling unit, 86 ton (302 kW), pad-mounted exterior - new concrete equipment pad, refrigerant piping, electrical disconnect, startup and commissioning; replaces C-1 per as-built equipment schedule Sheet 5-20
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Air-cooled chiller, 80-100 ton, complete with refrigerant charge, controls, and commissioning. RSM 23 64 16.

items.desc: New air handling unit, floor-setting horizontal type, approximately 7,000 CFM - filters, coils, fan section, drain pan, and electrical connection; replaces AHU-1 per equipment schedule Sheet 5-20
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Air handling unit, horizontal, 5,000-8,000 CFM range, complete. RSM 23 74 33.

items.desc: New circulation pumps, centrifugal, 2 EA - pipe flanges, flexible connectors, isolation valves, motor starters, and electrical connections; replaces P-1 x2 per equipment schedule
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Centrifugal pump, base-mounted, 1.5-3 HP, complete with fittings and starters. RSM 23 21 13.

items.desc: New booster coil unit, duct insertion type - electrical connection and duct reconnection; replaces BC-1 per equipment schedule Sheet 5-20
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Duct insertion electric heating coil unit, commercial, complete. RSM 23 83 16.

items.desc: New chilled water distribution piping, Type L copper, insulated, building-wide - main supply and return runs, branch lines, isolation valves, balance valves, and pressure testing; approximately 350 LF from piping diagram Sheet 10-20
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Copper pipe, insulated, chilled water distribution, 2-in dia avg, 350 LF estimated. RSM 23 21 13.16.

items.desc: New supply and return ductwork, diffusers, registers, and volume dampers building-wide - sheet metal fab, hangers, insulation, and all air distribution devices for 24 rooms per 1st floor duct plan Sheet 11-20; 13,484 SF
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: HVAC ductwork system, supply and return, commercial, complete per SF floor area. RSM 23 31 13.

items.desc: New power roof ventilators - replace RF-1 through RF-6 per as-built equipment schedule Sheet 5-20; 9 EA per field count confirmed
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Power roof ventilator, centrifugal, 1,000-15,000 CFM, complete. RSM 23 34 23.

items.desc: New gravity roof ventilators - replace GV-1 and GF-2, 2 EA per as-built equipment schedule Sheet 5-20
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Gravity roof ventilator, 300-500 CFM, complete. RSM 23 34 16.

items.desc: New exhaust fans, hanger-mounted centrifugal - replace EF-1, EF-2, EF-3, HF-1, HF-2, 5 EA per as-built equipment schedule Sheet 5-20
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Centrifugal hanger-mounted exhaust fan, commercial, complete. RSM 23 34 13.

items.desc: DDC/BAS building automation controls - DDC for 24 zones per duct plan Sheet 11-20, central controller, thermostat per zone, wiring, and programming
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: DDC HVAC controls, commercial building, 24 zones complete. RSM 25 30 00.

items.desc: Demo existing cast iron sanitary DWV piping, floor drains, and cleanouts building-wide; original 1984 construction, 42 years old; per 1st floor piping plan Sheet 8-20 and drain piping isometric Sheet 9-20
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Cast iron pipe demolition, DWV system, existing commercial building, per SF. RSM 02 41 19.

items.desc: New Schedule 40 PVC drain, waste, and vent (DWV) system building-wide - all fixture drains, soil stacks, vent stacks, and cleanouts per IPC 2021; from all fixture locations to first sanitary manhole outside building
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: PVC DWV system, commercial building, complete per SF floor area. RSM 22 11 16.

items.desc: Demo existing domestic water piping (cold water supply and domestic hot water distribution) building-wide; all branch piping serving restrooms, mech room, hose bibs, and service sink; per piping plan Sheet 8-20
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Domestic water piping demolition, existing commercial building, per SF. RSM 02 41 19.

items.desc: New Type L copper cold water distribution system building-wide - water service entry through building to all fixture locations, isolation valves, pressure-reducing valves, and hose bibs
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Copper domestic cold water distribution, commercial, per SF floor area. RSM 22 11 13.

items.desc: New building drain connection to sanitary sewer - remove and replace existing site sewer line, new PVC 6-inch SDR-35 from building exit to first manhole, excavation, backfill, and surface restoration
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: PVC SDR-35 site sewer, 6-in dia, 50 LF estimated, includes excavation and backfill. RSM 33 31 13.

items.desc: New commercial electric water heater, 100-gallon - remove existing 2004 unit past service life, install new unit with supply connections, T&P relief valve, floor drain piping, and electrical connection
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Commercial electric water heater, 80-100 gal, furnished and installed complete. RSM 22 33 30.

items.desc: Full restroom fixture replacement, all restroom spaces (Rooms 108A, 108B, 110A, 110B) - water closets 4 EA, urinals 3 EA, lavatories 3 EA, shower sets 2 EA, service sink 1 EA; per plumbing fixture schedule Sheet 7-20
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Fixture replacement package per schedule Sheet 7-20. WC $1,250 EA, urinal $1,000 EA, lavatory $900 EA, shower $1,900 EA, service sink $1,100 EA. RSM 22 41 13.

items.desc: Restroom ceramic tile, floor and wall, all restroom spaces - floor tile 500 SF and wall tile 1,000 SF (wet areas to 8 ft) per interior finish schedule Sheet 6-20 of as-built drawings
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Ceramic tile floor $18/SF (500 SF = $9,000) and wall $16/SF (1,000 SF = $16,000). RSM 09 30 13.

items.desc: Restroom accessories replacement - toilet paper holders, towel dispensers, mirrors, soap dispensers, and grab bars, all restroom spaces
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Restroom accessories, commercial grade, 6 spaces x $867 avg. RSM 10 28 16.

items.desc: Restroom LED lighting replacement - all restroom spaces, 15 fixtures, including conduit, wiring, switches, and circuit connections
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: LED recessed fixture with box, commercial, complete with wiring. RSM 26 51 00.

items.desc: Replace overhead sectional steel roll-up doors building-wide - remove and replace existing doors past service life per David Brennan mechanical evaluation 19 Mar 2026; 5 EA per as-built floor plan Sheet 7-36 (Rooms 112, 114, 116, 117, 118 north face)
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Overhead sectional steel door, commercial, 10x10 opening, complete with hardware and motor operator. RSM 08 33 23.

items.desc: Replace air curtains at building entry doors - remove and replace non-functioning air curtains per David Brennan mechanical evaluation 19 Mar 2026; 2 EA (end of each hallway, confirmed)
items.notes: RS Means FY24 CONUS: Commercial air curtain, 36-in width, heated, complete with electrical connection. RSM 23 34 43.

sections.title: 1.  STORAGE RECONFIGURATION - Remove/Replace Floor-to-Ceiling Wire Mesh Cage Partitions, Room 101
2.  TELECOMMUNICATIONS ROOM - INTERIOR CONSTRUCTION - New TR per UFC 3-580-01 (21 Nov 2024) Para 2-3.1.2.2 & MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024
3.  TELECOMMUNICATIONS ROOM - HVAC - Dedicated A/C per UFC 3-580-01 Para 2-3.1.3.3 & 2-3.1.3.4
4.  TELECOMMUNICATIONS ROOM - ELECTRICAL - Dedicated Panel and Wiring per UFC 3-580-01 Para 2-3.1.3.2
5.  COMMUNICATIONS INFRASTRUCTURE MODERNIZATION - Full Facility Scope per MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024 & UFC 3-580-01 (21 Nov 2024)
6.  HAZMAT - ACM MASTIC ABATEMENT - Bhate Environmental Survey 11/29/2001 (NVLAP accredited, Lab: Analytica Solutions)

items.desc: Remove existing floor-to-ceiling wire mesh cage partitions, Room 101 (full bay); includes disconnect, demo, and haul-off
items.notes: YELLOW - cage LF qty and layout unconfirmed; pending Markon floor plan field verification; UFC 3-580-01

items.desc: Install new floor-to-ceiling wire mesh cage partitions, Room 101; 3 tenant zones: CLB-4 / HQ 4th MAR REGT / UDP (4th Marines); includes framing, hardware, and seismic anchoring
items.notes: YELLOW - zone dimensions and total LF unconfirmed; pending unit layout confirmation and design

items.desc: Construct new TR interior partition walls; light gauge metal framing, 5/8 in Type X gypsum board, fire-rated; room sized at approx 1.1 pct of 19,304 SF served area per UFC 3-580-01 Para 2-3.1.2.2(c); no suspended ceiling per Para 2-3.1.2.3
items.notes: UFC 3-580-01 Para 2-3.1.2.2 & 2-3.1.2.3; NFPA 101; min room size 10 ft-6 in x 9 ft for bldgs >5,000 SF

items.desc: Install 3/4 in A-C plywood backboards (fire-retardant treated); cover three walls; 8 ft high; grade-A surface exposed; per MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024 Sec 4(c)(4)
items.notes: MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024 Sec 4(c)(4); UFC 3-580-01

items.desc: Install fire-rated door (min 36 in x 80 in); outswing; combination type lock; holds open unassisted; no threshold; per UFC 3-580-01 Para 2-3.1.2.4 and MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024 Sec 4(c)(3)
items.notes: UFC 3-580-01 Para 2-3.1.2.4; MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024 Sec 4(c)(3); NFPA 101

items.desc: Install dedicated mini-split A/C unit (1.5-ton); independent 24/7/365 thermostat; NOT on building time clock or setback; positive atmospheric pressure; space and power capacity for one additional identical unit per Para 2-3.1.3.4(d) (load calculated at <1 ton); includes refrigerant line, condensate, electrical connection

Install dedicated electrical branch circuit panel board; 100A min bus; 120/208V 3-phase; 24-space; feed all TR loads from dedicated panel per UFC 3-580-01 Para 2-3.1.3.2; includes panel, breakers, grounding
items.notes: UFC 3-580-01 Para 2-3.1.3.2; MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024 Sec 4(c)(6)(a); NEC

items.desc: Install 125V 20A duplex convenience receptacles at 6 ft on-center intervals around TR perimeter walls; twist-lock type receptacles fed from dedicated circuits at each rack/cabinet per UFC 3-580-01 Para 2-3.1.3.2; includes wiring and conduit
items.notes: UFC 3-580-01 Para 2-3.1.3.2; MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024 Sec 4(c)(6)(c)(d); NEC

items.desc: Install overhead cable tray system (slotted bottom); sized for 50 pct fill ratio; extend along three walls above equipment cabinets per MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024 Sec 4(c)(8)(a); includes waterfalls, supports, bonding
items.notes: MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024 Sec 4(c)(8)(a); UFC 3-580-01; TIA-569

items.desc: Communications infrastructure modernization - full facility scope: (1) remove and dispose non-EMT conduit (full facility); (2) install EMT conduit; (3) Cat 6 UTP NIPR (green) and SIPR (red in EMT) cabling; (4) WAO installation (min 2-port per location; 450mm AFF NIPR / 950mm AFF SIPR); (5) new enclosed mesh TR cabinet seismic Zone 4 anchored (4x 1/2 in bolts); (6) patch panels + cable management (WAOs + 25 pct expansion); (7) relocate existing rack from open admin office to new TR; (8) cable testing and test report. Comm engineer preliminary ROM.
items.notes: YELLOW - comm engineer ROM $100,000 based on available info; additional site survey required (unit items impeded TR access during initial survey); MCIPAC G-6 Policy Ltr 03-2024 Sec 4(b)(c)(f)(g); UFC 3-580-01

items.desc: ACM abatement mobilization, containment setup, and demobilization; OSHA 29 CFR 1926.1101 compliant; licensed OCONUS contractor
items.notes: OSHA 1926.1101; 40 CFR Part 61 NESHAP; abatement required prior to slab penetrations (seismic anchors, TR construction)

items.desc: ACM mastic abatement (H2 - brown floor tile mastic, 5 pct Chrysotile); Room 101 (main warehouse bay) and interior hallway; floor penetrations for cage seismic anchors and TR construction trigger OSHA 1926.1101 disturbance threshold.
items.notes: YELLOW - PWD ENV confirmation pending: flooring in Room 101/hallway may have been replaced since 2001 Bhate survey; if mastic removed in prior replacement, scope reduces; Bhate Environmental Survey 11/29/2001, Sample H2, PA Form confirmed

items.desc: ACM waste disposal - licensed OCONUS facility; bagged and labeled per OSHA 1926.1101; manifest documentation
items.notes: OSHA 1926.1101; 40 CFR Part 61 NESHAP; OCONUS disposal surcharge included in unit rate

items.desc: Industrial hygienist air monitoring - pre-abatement, continuous during abatement, post-abatement; OSHA personal air sampling
items.notes: OSHA 1926.1101; standard OCONUS IH monitoring package

items.desc: Clearance testing and documentation; final air samples; written clearance report; all required regulatory submittals
items.notes: OSHA 1926.1101; EPA NESHAP; 40 CFR Part 61
